facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html — mountHudTemplate (line 250), mountHudElements (line 164), mountStatBarsTick, mountWeaponHudTick, mountCrosshairTick, mountCombatHudTick, mountClockHudTick, mountVignetteTick, mountComboHudTick, mountBossBarTick, mountWaveHudTick, mountDebugHudTick. Each is a discrete game.html HUD; this iter does the bare-minimum shell (HP bar + kill count + ammo). Subsequent iters split into per-widget facets once the shell proves out.

data.comment: Singleton overlay. The hud Thinga owns its DOM container; widget facets paint into it. Future variants: minimalist-hud, debug-hud, builder-hud — each with its own tuning + facet set.
